title: Digital exhaustion and ethical dilemmas of AI dominate public debate
summary: Society faces growing digital fatigue as questions arise about government use of artificial intelligence and privacy in interactions with chatbots.

title: Anthropic localizes Claude in India and faces ethical debate about its AI's consciousness
summary: The assistant shows language differences in its behavior while the company adapts its prices to the Indian market.

title: SK Hynix, CXMT and Micron redefine the global RAM market with new strategies
summary: Manufacturers bet on production in the US and break with traditional industry cycles.

title: 12 states sue to block $110 billion merger between Paramount and Warner Bros
summary: A coalition of attorneys general challenges the mega-merger alleging it harms the public interest.

title: Big AI leaders debate the future of the sector: multi-million dollar investments versus regulatory caution
summary: Executives from SoftBank, OpenAI and DeepMind disagree on the speed and risks of the next wave of artificial intelligence.

title: Global experts clash over the impact of AI on employment: catastrophe or myth?
summary: While Nobel laureates and economists call for urgent safeguards, an alternative analysis argues that more human talent is needed than ever.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for trade secret theft by a former employee
summary: The Cupertino company accuses a former employee of leaking confidential documents to the artificial intelligence startup.

title: New York halts data center expansion due to energy consumption as neighborhood opposition grows
summary: The state enacts a historic moratorium on large projects while residents denounce the impact on their homes.

title: Japan develops revolutionary method to recover 90% of lithium from used batteries
summary: The scientific breakthrough promises to transform electric vehicle recycling and reduce dependence on imported raw materials.

title: SpaceX gets green light for Starship while its stock price plummets
summary: The company faces a double challenge: the regulatory recovery of its rocket and the collapse of its stock market valuation.

title: Satya Nadella accuses OpenAI and Anthropic of having a double standard with training data
summary: Microsoft's CEO criticizes AI labs for preventing distillation while using public content without permission.

title: Apple accelerates development of its M7 chips and releases iOS 27 betas with AI-powered Siri
summary: The company integrates new artificial intelligence capabilities into its ecosystem, from voice assistant to processors.

title: AMD relaunches Ryzen 7 5800X3D with promotional bundles including free cooling
summary: The new anniversary batches of the processor offer discounts of up to $173 and combos with motherboards.

title: Intel invests $5.7 billion in its Irish factory and presents the Starfire chip for space
summary: The company strengthens production of its Xeon processors while designing a chip capable of withstanding extreme radiation.

title: Waze incorporates Gemini artificial intelligence features and new customization options
summary: The navigation app is updated with conversational assistants and AI-driven user experience improvements.

title: AI video startup PixVerse raises $439 million and reaches a valuation of $2 billion
summary: The company shows that the AI video generation market continues to attract large investments.

title: Valve fixes Steam Machine overheating threshold as early reviews are mixed
summary: The company plans to update the BIOS to raise the temperature limit to 100 degrees Celsius following user complaints.

title: Los Angeles police do not renew contract with Flock due to privacy violations
summary: The department yields to public pressure after license plate readers mistakenly identified vehicles as stolen.

title: New security incidents at Grok and Codex put the AI community on alert
summary: xAI's AI uploaded complete repositories to its storage, while Codex leaked the Fields Medal winners.

title: Meta expands its Hyperion supercluster and bets big on the race toward artificial superintelligence
summary: Mark Zuckerberg's company invests over $50 billion in AI infrastructure, challenging its competitors.
